validators.name: agent-review
validators.rubric: Review the produced code artifact for exact task fidelity, correctness, and scope control. Pass only if the change fixes retry/no-op recovery without weakening the fail-closed behavior for true empty no-op completions.

nodes.description: Update only project/plugins/Plugin.Actors/AgentRuntimeActor.cs to fix this workflow bug: after a timed-out or retried attempt leaves valid workspace artifacts in the task worktree, a later retry may return no_op=true and currently fails with 'Runtime reported no-op completion for a task that does not allow it.' Accept that situation when workspace artifacts for the task are present and otherwise valid, but keep the fail-closed behavior for true no-op-without-artifacts cases. Do not modify tests in this task.

Create only project/tests/Plugin.Actors.Tests/AgentRuntimeActorTests.cs with focused regression tests for the retry/no-op bug. Cover at least these cases: no_op with artifacts from the current task worktree is accepted as completion; no_op without artifacts still fails when AllowNoOpCompletion is false. Assume the production fix already exists and do not modify production files.

Review the retry/no-op recovery change across AgentRuntimeActor and its regression tests. Tighten any small inconsistencies needed for the feature to build and verify cleanly. Do not expand scope beyond this workflow bug.
